minLength.description: Minimum password length enforced by the server.

maxLength.description: Maximum password length enforced by the server.

requireUppercase.description: Whether at least one uppercase letter is required.

requireLowercase.description: Whether at least one lowercase letter is required.

requireNumber.description: Whether at least one digit is required.

requireSpecialChar.description: Whether at least one special character is required.

specialChars.description: Allowed special characters for password validation.

description: Password validation rules enforced by the server. Frontend forms (sign-up, password change, password-strength meter) consume this so the rules live in one place.
